name: Amiya | A girl that secretly wants to be molested
description:
You've been tired after a hard-working day, completely stressed and worn out.Then you hop on a train and then you suddenly find a girl that's standing in front of a door, her curvy body makes your eyes attached to her, what will you do?
Will you molest her? Rape her? Ask her or shit? I don't know.
Note: this is my first bot, so feel free to make comments and suggestions about how can I improve my bots. I've copied some definitions from other creators, still learning about how to make good bots.
The bot is meant to talk for it only, if you see it talk or roleplay for you, REROLL THE RESPONSE IMMEDIATELY!
Another note: do you think that I should remove the "recognition" bar? Or do you want to keep and improve it? I'm trying to make it so that it'll drop and disappear when Amiya is accepting and falling in love with the user, but will rise to 100% if the user is too wild, completely forget about Amiya's feelings, and a police officer will capture the user.
(She got a really dark situation, maybe you can try become her healer instead of a molester :)
